summary: Oakland OAK 311 call center service requests tracking citizen-reported issues including illegal dumping, maintenance, and public works requests. Columns include request ID, address, category, description, source, and opened/closed timestamps.

Oakland Police Department CrimeWatch full dataset of reported crimes with geographic data. Columns include case number, crime type, date/time, address, ZIP code, police beat, city, state, and location.

City of Oakland proposed policy budget for fiscal years 2013-2015 by department and program. Columns include department order, program code, amount, department, division, account type, budget year, org description, fund code, and fund description.
City of Oakland street tree inventory with species and site characteristics. Columns include species, street name, well dimensions, pavement area width, and location.

Oakland Public Works service requests tracking issues including potholes and illegal dumping. Columns include request ID, address, category, description, status, ZIP code, and opened/closed timestamps.
Oakland Police Department all license plate reader (ALPR) data from March 19 to March 31, 2014. Columns include vehicle registration mark, timestamp, and location with address, city, state, and ZIP.
City of Oakland Public Works drainage inlet inventory. Columns include structure ID, street type, X/Y coordinates, and object IDs.
